summary: Frontend testing completed for Create Repair Rule modal with new Inspection Q&A Category dropdown feature. All 8 features tested and working correctly.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Create Repair Rule modal with Inspection Q&A Category dropdown fully verified. All features working as expected.

features_tested.feature: Create Rule modal shows 3 dropdowns in order: Repair Part, Inspection Q&A Category, Linked Question
features_tested.evidence: Screenshot 07_create_rule_modal.png shows all 3 dropdowns in correct order

features_tested.feature: Category dropdown shows all Q&A categories alphabetically
features_tested.evidence: Screenshot 09_category_dropdown.png shows 23 categories sorted alphabetically (AC & Cooling Inspection, Air Condition System Check, Battery Health Checkup, etc.)

features_tested.feature: Linked Question dropdown is disabled until a category is selected
features_tested.evidence: Screenshot 07_create_rule_modal.png shows 'Select a category first' placeholder when no category selected

features_tested.feature: After selecting a category, helper text shows 'X questions available in this category'
features_tested.evidence: Screenshot 10_after_category_select.png shows '10 questions available in this category' for Exterior Inspection, Screenshot shows '4 questions available in this category' for Battery Health Checkup

features_tested.feature: Linked Question dropdown only shows questions from the selected category
features_tested.evidence: Screenshot 11_filtered_questions.png shows only Exterior Inspection questions when that category is selected

features_tested.feature: Selecting a question auto-fills the category if user picks question directly (when editing)
features_tested.evidence: Code review confirms handleQuestionSelect() updates selectedCategoryId when question's category differs from current selection (lines 883-897)

features_tested.feature: Validation shows proper error messages for missing Part, Category, and Question
features_tested.evidence: Screenshots 12-14 show toast errors: 'Please select a Repair Part', 'Please select an Inspection Q&A Category', 'Please select a Linked Question'

features_tested.feature: Complete rule creation flow works: Part → Category → Question → Add Condition → Save Rule
features_tested.evidence: Screenshots 17-19 show complete flow with Battery part, Battery Health Checkup category, question selection, and condition form with answer options

categories_verified: Infotainment, Electrical System and Accessories Check

code_review.qaCategories_useMemo: Correctly extracts unique categories from questions using Map and sorts alphabetically (lines 821-831)
code_review.filteredQuestions_useMemo: Correctly filters questions based on selectedCategoryId (lines 834-837)
code_review.handleCategorySelect: Correctly resets question selection when category changes (lines 869-881)
code_review.handleQuestionSelect: Correctly auto-fills category when question is selected directly (lines 883-897)
code_review.validation: Proper validation for part_id, selectedCategoryId, question_id, and conditions (lines 925-942)
code_review.disabled_state: Linked Question dropdown correctly disabled when no category selected (line 1026)

navigation.path: Settings → Repairs Module → Question Rules → Create Rule
